goal: Conduct a strict forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay results to confirm or reject their validity before any further research.
global_constraints: Immutable reference: active-signal-v1@1 only; never modify baseline parameters, thresholds, features, or execution logic.
No new features, new directional scouts, early-cuts, or label changes are permitted in v11.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows (same-window truth only).
Lockbox must never be used to choose thresholds, labels, or model hyper-parameters.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate runs; identical deltas across all three must be explained, not accepted.
Rule-based overlay must be tested before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Window integrity audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that all v10 comparisons were made on identical windows with no look-ahead or data leakage through threshold selection.
slices.objective: Verify that all v10 comparisons were made on identical windows with no look-ahead or data leakage through threshold selection.
success_criteria: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid, with boundary timestamps documented.
evidence_requirements: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid, with boundary timestamps documented.

slices.title: Feature leakage audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that every micro-structure feature is causally clean with no future information leaking into decisions.
slices.objective: Verify that every micro-structure feature is causally clean with no future information leaking into decisions.
success_criteria: Per-feature leakage verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage.
evidence_requirements: Per-feature leakage verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage.

slices.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether the suspiciously high veto model AUC (~0.95) is caused by label construction nearly overlapping with the dominant feature.
slices.objective: Determine whether the suspiciously high veto model AUC (~0.95) is caused by label construction nearly overlapping with the dominant feature.
success_criteria: Label verdict: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid.
evidence_requirements: Label verdict: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid.
